name: compliance sync mechanism: rejects a malformed catalog entry (missing required §2.19 field) with exit 2 and a clear error
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards && printf -- '- id: broken-entry\n  name: Broken\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards"
